scenario.name: Vikram
scenario.key_situation: Comparing PW with Unacademy, price sensitive

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Hello Vikram! Main Priya bol rahi hun PhysicsWallah se. Aapne humari courses ke baare mein inquiry ki thi. JEE Main ki preparation ke liye right?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Haan didi, main class 11 mein hun aur JEE Main ki taiyari kar raha hun. Actually main confuse hun ki PW lun ya Unacademy.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Samajh gaya Vikram. Pehle mujhe batao ki aap currently kaise prepare kar rahe ho? Koi coaching join ki hai ya self study kar rahe ho?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Abhi tak bas NCERT padh raha tha ghar pe. Patna mein offline coaching bahut expensive hai, isliye online soch raha hun. Budget thoda tight hai.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul samajh sakti hun. Online coaching mein cost effective option milta hai. Btao, aapko lagta hai ki Physics, Chemistry, Maths mein se koi particular subject mein extra help chahiye?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Physics aur Maths mein main weak hun. Chemistry thodi better hai. Unacademy mein dekha tha, wahan bhi good teachers hain but price compare kar raha hun.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Good! Dekho Vikram, main aapko honest feedback dungi. Unacademy bhi accha platform hai, but PW mein kuch unique advantages hain especially aapke budget aur requirements ke liye.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Kya advantages hain? Main sunna chahta hun details mein.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: First, humare Physics mein Alakh Sir personally padhate hain jo 16+ years experienced hain. Maths mein Ashish Arora sir hain. Aur jo main point hai - our Lakshya batch for JEE Main sirf ₹3999 mein complete course hai.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: ₹3999 mein? Ye to bahut reasonable lag raha hai. Unacademy mein to ₹8000+ aa raha tha similar course ke liye. Lekin quality compromise to nahi hogi na?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul nahi Vikram! PW ka motto hi hai 'Revolution against expensive education'. Same quality content, experienced faculty, but affordable price. Aapke paas 16 months hain, which is perfect timing.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Hmmm, ye to accha lag raha hai. Is course mein exactly kya kya include hota hai? Live classes hain ya recorded?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Lakshya batch mein both live aur recorded classes hain. Complete NCERT + JEE level syllabus, weekly tests, doubt clearing sessions, aur monthly mock tests bhi. Plus aapko mobile app pe lifetime access milta hai.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Doubt clearing kaise hota hai? Main Patna se hun to face to face to possible nahi hai.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul! Humara dedicated doubt clearing platform hai app mein. Photo upload karke doubt ask kar sakte ho, usually 2-4 hours mein response mil jata hai. Plus live doubt sessions bhi weekly hote hain.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Ye to helpful hai. Ek aur question - agar mujhe lage ki course suit nahi kar raha after joining, to kya refund policy hai?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Very valid question Vikram. Humare paas 7-day money back guarantee hai. First week mein agar satisfied nahi ho, to full refund mil jata hai. No questions asked policy hai.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: That's good. Didi, ek concern hai - main suna hun ki PW mein batch size bahut big hoti hai. Individual attention mil pata hai?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Good point! Haan batch size large hoti hai, but individual attention ke liye humne proper system banaya hai. Doubt platform, mentorship program, aur regular assessment ke through track karte hain each student ko.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Okay, ye reasonable lag raha hai. Payment kaise karna hota hai? EMI option hai kya?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Haan bilkul! ₹3999 ko aap 3 EMI mein pay kar sakte ho - approximately ₹1400 per month. Credit card, debit card, UPI, net banking sab options available hain.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: EMI mein to manage ho jayega. Ek last question - agar main abhi enroll karun to kab se classes start ho jayengi?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Classes already running hain Vikram, but don't worry! Missed lectures ka recorded backup milta hai. Aap immediately access kar sakte ho. Fresh batch bhi next month start ho raha hai if you prefer.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Fresh batch better rahega I think. Next month matlab January mein?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Haan, January 15th se new Lakshya batch start hoga. Perfect timing hai aapke liye because 16 months proper time mil jayega JEE Main 2025 ke liye.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Sounds good didi. Main kal ghar pe parents se discuss karunga aur decide karunga. Kya aap mujhe enrollment details WhatsApp pe send kar sakti hain?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Absolutely Vikram! Main aapko complete course details, syllabus, faculty information, aur enrollment process ka link WhatsApp kar dungi. Koi aur questions ho to feel free to ask.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Thank you so much Priya didi. Bahut helpful rahi aap. Kal tak decide kar lunga aur call kar dunga.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Most welcome Vikram! Main wait karungi aapke decision ka. All the best for your JEE preparation. PW family mein aapka welcome hai. Take care!

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Thank you didi. Have a good day!
